name: test_trav_52_cancel_reservation_with_penalty_voucher
statusTrace:
browser = <selenium.webdriver.chrome.webdriver.WebDriver (session="e438ff830840d95983dabf8f6e4fe65b")>
config = <tests.environment_config.StagingConfig object at 0x7f790bad6390>

    @pytest.mark.staging
    def test_trav_52_cancel_reservation_with_penalty_voucher(browser, config):
    
        wait = WebDriverWait(browser, 20)
        search_hotel = SearchHotelPage(browser)
        add_customer = AddCustomer(browser)
        add_tourists = AddTourists(browser)
        handle_reservation = HandleReservation(browser)
        details_reservation = DetailsReservation(browser)
        cancel_reservation_modal = CancelReservationModal(browser)
        search_reservation_page = SearchReservationPage(browser)
        proforma = Proforma(browser)
        payment_modal = PaymentModal(browser)
        invoice_page = InvoicePage(browser)
    
        search_hotel.select_resort("Mamaia")
        time.sleep(5)
        search_hotel.calendar_months_ahead(3)
        time.sleep(5)
    
        wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.CSS_SELECTOR, '[class="fa fa-umbrella"]')))  # Wait for rooms to load
        search_hotel.reserve_random_room_allotment("disponibil", 3000)
    
        # Add client
        wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.ID, "addClientModalLabel")))  # Wait for client form
        add_customer.add_customer("gabriel.filip@wesrom.com")
    
        time.sleep(5)
        add_tourists.select_number_of_rates("2")
        add_tourists.save_reservation()
    
        search_reservation_page.open_proforma()
        browser.switch_to.window(browser.window_handles[1])
    
        proforma.choose_to_pay_specific_term("1")
    
        browser.switch_to.window(browser.window_handles[2])
        payment_modal.select_voucher()
        payment_modal.press_save_button_without_email()
        time.sleep(10)
    
        browser.switch_to.window(browser.window_handles[1])
        browser.refresh()
    
        proforma.check_term_status("1", "Platit")
        proforma.check_term_status("2", "Neplatit")
        time.sleep(3)
        browser.close()
        browser.switch_to.window(browser.window_handles[0])
    
        browser.refresh()
        time.sleep(5)
        search_reservation_page.open_invoice()
        browser.switch_to.window(browser.window_handles[1])
        time.sleep(10)
        invoice_page.count_number_of_invoices(1)
    
        browser.close()
        browser.switch_to.window(browser.window_handles[0])
    
        handle_reservation.open_reservation_details()
        time.sleep(10)
>       details_reservation.cancel_reservation()

message = ''

    def until(self, method: Callable[[D], Union[Literal[False], T]], message: str = "") -> T:
        """Wait until the method returns a value that is not False.
    
        Calls the method provided with the driver as an argument until the
        return value does not evaluate to ``False``.
    
        Parameters:
        ----------
        method: callable(WebDriver)
            - A callable object that takes a WebDriver instance as an argument.
    
        message: str
            - Optional message for :exc:`TimeoutException`
    
        Return:
        -------
        object: T
            - The result of the last call to `method`
    
        Raises:
        -------
        TimeoutException
            - If 'method' does not return a truthy value within the WebDriverWait
            object's timeout
    
        Example:
        --------
        >>> from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
        >>> from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
        >>> from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
    
        # Wait until an element is visible on the page
        >>> wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10)
        >>> element = wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.ID, "exampleId")))
        >>> print(element.text)
        """
        screen = None
        stacktrace = None
    
        end_time = time.monotonic() + self._timeout
        while True:
            try:
                value = method(self._driver)
                if value:
                    return value
            except self._ignored_exceptions as exc:
                screen = getattr(exc, "screen", None)
                stacktrace = getattr(exc, "stacktrace", None)
            if time.monotonic() > end_time:
                break
            time.sleep(self._poll)
